/opt/homebrew/bin/gfortran  -std=legacy -fPIC -O2 -g -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libsolvent.dylib -install_name @rpath/libsolvent.dylib CMakeFiles/solvent.dir/mnsol_interface.f90.o CMakeFiles/solvent.dir/mnsol_mem.F.o CMakeFiles/solvent.dir/mnsol.F.o   -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib  -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib64  -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib64
